subject: [PATCH v10 01/15] mm: decouple protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch decouples the protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING by introducing a new configuration option, CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_PTE_PROTNONE. This allows architectures that support present-but-inaccessible page table entries (protnone PTEs) to use this capability independently of NUMA balancing. The six supported architectures are updated to select the new option, and CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING now depends on it. No functional changes are made, as the same set of architectures continues to have working protnone support.
